creator: jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de
text:
Update of the port of Squeak version 1.

Fix: 

This port makes lang/squeak obsolete and lang/squeak should therefore
be removed.
How-To-Repeat: the output of 'shar `find /usr/ports/lang/squeak1 -print`':

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/COMMENT
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/DESCR
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/PLIST
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files/md5
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches/patch-aa
#	/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/Makefile
#
echo c - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1
mkdir -p /usr/ports/lang/squeak1 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg
mkdir -p /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/COMMENT'
XA Smalltalk system with graphical user interface.
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/DESCR'
XThis is the port of squeak, a free smalltalk system with a graphical
Xuser interface. 
X
Xhttp://squeak.cs.uiuc.edu/
X
X-- Roland Jesse <jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de>
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/DESCR
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/SqueakVM
Xshare/squeak/Squeak1.31.changes
Xshare/squeak/Squeak1.31.image
Xshare/squeak/SqueakV1.sources
X@dirrm share/squeak
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/pkg/PLIST
echo c - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files
mkdir -p /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files/md5 << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files/md5'
XMD5 (squeak/1.31.tar.gz) = b4ae8440a89573db57b034dd546ab122
XMD5 (squeak/SqueakV1.sources) = 72bb18e9b23f6a841efd332277c154d4
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/files/md5
echo c - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches
mkdir -p /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches/patch-aa'
X*** /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/work/1.31/src/GNUmakefile.conf	Thu Mar  5 15:42:07 1998
X--- GNUmakefile.conf	Mon Dec 21 01:01:59 1998
X***************
X*** 27,33 ****
X  
X  # platform identification
X  
X! UTSMAC:=	$(shell arch     | tr [A-Z] [a-z])
X  UTSSYS:=	$(shell uname -s | tr [A-Z] [a-z] | sed 's/-//g')
X  UTSREL:=	$(shell uname -r | tr [A-Z] [a-z])
X  
X--- 27,34 ----
X  
X  # platform identification
X  
X! #UTSMAC:=	$(shell arch     | tr [A-Z] [a-z])
X! UTSMAC:=	$(shell uname -m | tr [A-Z] [a-z])
X  UTSSYS:=	$(shell uname -s | tr [A-Z] [a-z] | sed 's/-//g')
X  UTSREL:=	$(shell uname -r | tr [A-Z] [a-z])
X  
X***************
X*** 52,57 ****
X--- 53,71 ----
X  #									   #
X  #			START OF CONFIGURATION SECTION			   #
X  #									   #
X+ ifeq ($(SYSTEM),                                        freebsd)
X+   CC=		gcc
X+   CCFLAGS:=	-O3 -fomit-frame-pointer $(PROFILE)
X+   INCDIRS:=	-I/usr/X11R6/include
X+   LDO=		ld -r
X+   LD=		gcc
X+   LDFLAGS:=	$(PROFILE)
X+   LIBDIRS=	-L/usr/X11R6/lib
X+   LIBS=		-lX11 -lXext -lm
X+   GNU=		gnu-
X+   GAWK=		awk
X+ endif
X+ 
X  ifeq ($(SYSTEM),					linux)
X    CC=		gcc
X    CCFLAGS:=	-O2 -g $(PROFILE)
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/patches/patch-aa
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/squeak1/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   	squeak1
X# Version required:    			1.31
X# Date created:        			20 December 1998
X# Whom:                			jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	1.31
XPKGNAME=	squeak-1.31
XCATEGORIES=	lang
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.apfel.de/~jesse/squeak/ \
X		ftp://alix.inria.fr/pub/squeak/unix/ \
X		ftp://st.cs.uiuc.edu/pub/Smalltalk/Squeak/unix/ \
X		ftp://ftp.cs.uni-magdeburg.de/pub/Smalltalk/Smalltalk/Squeak/ \
X		ftp://ftp.cs.uni-magdeburg.de/pub/Smalltalk/Smalltalk/Squeak/unix/ \
X		http://st-www.cs.uiuc.edu/ftp/Smalltalk/Squeak/ \
X		ftp://uiarchive.cso.uiuc.edu/pub/lang/smalltalk/smalltalk/Squeak/ \
X		http://wuarchive.wustl.edu/languages/smalltalk/smalltalk/Squeak/
XDISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} image/${SQUEAK_SRC}
X
XMAINTAINER=	jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de
X
XALLFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${SQUEAK_SRC}
XEXTRACT_ONLY=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}
X
XDIST_SUBDIR=	squeak
XSQUEAK_SRC=	SqueakV1.sources
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XMAKEFILE=	GNUmakefile
XVMBUILD=	freebsd
XMAKE_ARGS=	VMBUILD=${VMBUILD}
XPORTMAKE=	${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} \
X		${MAKEFILE} ${MAKE_ARGS}
X
Xdo-build:
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${PORTMAKE} mkdir)
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/${VMBUILD} && ${PORTMAKE} interp)
X
Xdo-install:
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/${VMBUILD} && \
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} SqueakVM-1.31-${VMBUILD} ${PREFIX}/bin/SqueakVM)
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/squeak
X.for f in Squeak1.31.changes Squeak1.31.image
X	(cd ${WRKSRC}/image && ${INSTALL_DATA} $f ${PREFIX}/share/squeak/$f)
X.endfor
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/${SQUEAK_SRC} \
X		${PREFIX}/share/squeak/${SQUEAK_SRC}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/squeak1/Makefile
exit
